message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should be in the centre and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should serve north african food
If there is no such restaurant, how about one that serves chinese food
Once you find the restaurant you want to book a table for 2 people at 19:00 on monday
Make sure you get the reference number
You are also looking for a train. The train should go to cambridge and should arrive by 09:45
The train should depart from kings lynn and should be on the same day as the restaurant booking
Once you find the train you want to make a booking for the same group of people
Make sure you get the reference number
